root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I'm not giving up the bonds I've made with the people I care about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You really didn't understand what I meant, did you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You really didn't understand what I meant, did you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You really didn't understand what I meant, did you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I said I'd kill the people you care about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I said I'd kill the people you care about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I said I'd kill the people you care about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, you won't.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, you won't.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, you won't.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I believe you can't.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I believe you can't.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I believe you can't.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get away from Noelle!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get away from Noelle!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get away from Noelle!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: My attacks can't reach her...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: My attacks can't reach her...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: My attacks can't reach her...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wolf, you're still a threat, I'll admit that...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wolf, you're still a threat, I'll admit that...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wolf, you're still a threat, I'll admit that...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you're clearly pushing yourself. How many times have you used the Qliphoth Factor without Droma?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you're clearly pushing yourself. How many times have you used the Qliphoth Factor without Droma?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you're clearly pushing yourself. How many times have you used the Qliphoth Factor without Droma?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up, I already told you...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up, I already told you...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up, I already told you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll use it again... and again...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll use it again... and again...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll use it again... and again...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: As many times as it takes to save Noelle...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: As many times as it takes to save Noelle...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: As many times as it takes to save Noelle...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see. But it seems you've forgotten something.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see. But it seems you've forgotten something.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see. But it seems you've forgotten something.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In this theater, I'm not the one you're fighting...
root.m_Talk_DEU: In this theater, I'm not the one you're fighting...
root.m_Talk_FRA: In this theater, I'm not the one you're fighting...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Brand of sin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Brand of sin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Brand of sin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kurgh...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kurgh...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kurgh...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mina...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mina...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mina...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mina, are you okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mina, are you okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mina, are you okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grgh...! Ngh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grgh...! Ngh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grgh...! Ngh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please, wake up, Mina...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please, wake up, Mina...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please, wake up, Mina...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can't fall here...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can't fall here...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can't fall here...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're so close. We're finally all going home together...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're so close. We're finally all going home together...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're so close. We're finally all going home together...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So please, open your eyes, Mina...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So please, open your eyes, Mina...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So please, open your eyes, Mina...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's this...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's this...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's this...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Vajra...? Why is it here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Vajra...? Why is it here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Vajra...? Why is it here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa, vajra's glowing...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa, vajra's glowing...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa, vajra's glowing...?
